source.page_title: Christie Gardens Apartments and Care -- Join Our Team
source.validation_reason: Career language detected, but job state is unclear
source.body_text_sample:
Find us on indeed.ca

Who We Are

We are a Christian not-for-profit senior living community experienced in delivering distinctive services within a continuum of living. Our mandate is to empower elders to live well through excellence, community, and grace.

If you are looking for a place to contribute to the holistic health and wellness of our elders and belong to a highly valued staff team in a stable industry, consider applying with Christie Gardens.

We have opportunities for employment from time to time, across all departments. Please search for us on indeed.ca to apply.

What We Value
Our Residents:

We care about the well-being of our elders — not only physically, but emotionally and spiritually as well. We have high standards for our home and facility, making us a respected leader in the industry for over 40 years.

Our Staff

It all begins with our staff. Our culture is one of collaboration, support, teamwork, and ongoing training and development. We provide opportunities for growth within the organization and reimbursement for education that has to do with elder care.

We encourage diversity, inclusion, transparency, the sharing of new ideas, well-being, and work-life balance.

Accessibility

Christie Gardens is an equal opportunity employer and we welcome applications from a wide range of qualified candidates, including people with disabilities.

If you have questions or require assistance with the application process please contact us by sending mail to:

Christie
